name: Finance News OpenClaw Skill
description: Production-ready finance news skill for OpenClaw. Delivers finance news aggregation, portfolio alerts, and earnings tracking. Core functionality covers news feeds, portfolio monitoring, and earnings calendar integration.
review: Production-ready finance news skill from a veteran maintainer (est. 2012). Core functionality including news aggregation, portfolio alerts, and earnings tracking all working. Solid implementation with comprehensive coverage of finance data sources.
